_comment: Canonical OperatorSlot wire format for SSE operator list events. This is a lightweight projection of OperatorDocument containing only the fields needed by the operator panel list UI (~10 fields vs 50+ in full OperatorDocument). Consumers: g8ed (JS OperatorSlot in operator_model.js), g8ee (Python TBD), g8eo (Go TBD).
_comment.field_naming: FIELD NAMING: Wire format projections use 'operator_id' instead of 'id' for clarity in cross-component contexts where the entity type may not be immediately obvious. This maps directly to OperatorDocument.core_identity.id (see operator_document.json _comment.field_naming for the full convention).

operator_slot._description: Lightweight operator projection for SSE operator list events. Reduces payload size significantly compared to full OperatorDocument.

operator_id.description: Durable operator identifier. Maps from OperatorDocument.core_identity.id.

status.description: Operator status (e.g., 'available', 'active', 'bound', 'offline'). Consumers should validate against their own enum values.

status_display.description: Human-readable status string, typically mirrors status value

web_session_id.description: Web session ID this operator is bound to (if any)

is_g8ep.description: True when this is the g8e node operator (g8ep)

latest_heartbeat_snapshot.description: Latest heartbeat metrics snapshot for operator panel display. Contains performance, system identity, and network info from the most recent heartbeat.
